description:
This quiz assesses modern CSS proficiency through multiple-choice questions, challenging participants to evaluate their readiness to include CSS on their resumes. It tests intermediate to advanced skills with a playful yet technical tone, emphasizing practical application and up-to-date knowledge.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, layout techniques (Flexbox/Grid), responsive design, modern CSS features (e.g., CSS variables, Grid)
Audience: Frontend developers and web designers seeking to validate or enhance their CSS expertise.
